Name: Zombie
Ability: On play, summon all Zombies from your discard pile.
Idea: Keep returning to play, winning trough steady numbers and potential boosts.
Approx. Value: 1 for 1 coin, 3 for 2 coins if the second one resurrects the first.

Name: Burrick
Ability: During your turn, if this card has charges, it can skip attacking and consume a charge to hit a target and its adjacent cards.
Approx. Value: 2 for 2, potentially 5 for 2 if they get to trigger ability on 3 cards.

Name: Haunt
Ability: When Haunt defeats a character, gain 1 charge. Spend 1 charge: Haunt gains +1 strength for its next attack.
Approx. Value: 3 life for 3 coins, deals 2 damage, so potential 4 damage if they attack once and ability activates. 6 if they attack twice.

Name: Mystic's Soul
Ability: All allied characters on board gain 1 charge.
Approx. Value: +2 charges potential if 2 such cards on board.

Name: Book of Ash
Ability: Create and summon a copy of a common undead from your discard pile.
Idea: Play into undead theme. Boos zombies, get extra Haung
Approx. Value: For 4 coins you can get to summon 3 Zombies potential, or an extra Haunt

Name: Novice
Ability: On play, summon all Novices, not in your discard, if you have a stronger Hammerite on board.

Name: Temple Guard
Ability: Gain 1 life on play if you control fewer cards than your foe.
Idea: Low-level durable fighter with defensive buff.
Approx. Value: 3 for 3, 4 for 3 if less cards on board.

Name: Sachelman
Ability: On play, give 1 life to all Hammerites you control with less life than this card.
Idea: Prolong multiple Hammerites’ stay on board.
Approx. Value: 3 for 5 if alone, but potentially 6 for 5 if 3 other Hammerites on board.

Name: Saint Yora's Skull
Ability: Give 1 life to all Hammerites you control.
Idea: Mass boost, depending on which cards are on board and in hand.
Approx. Value: Potential 5-7 for 5 coins, depending on what you have.

Name: Markander
Ability: Loose a charge each time a Hammerite is played. At 0 charges, summon this card to the board.

Name: Downwinder
Ability: Steal a coin when attacking the enemy player.

Name: Cook
Approx. Value: 1 for 1, but you get to thin.

Name: Speed Potion
Ability: Chose a card from your hand. It gains haste.
